title: Cheesy Tteokbokki
description: A comforting Korean-inspired street food dish featuring chewy tteok and a creamy cheese sauce.
instructions: Cook the tteok according to the package instructions.
In a pan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the soy sauce, sugar, gochujang, and chili flakes. Stir to combine.
Add the milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the sauce simmer for 5 minutes.
Stir in the shredded cheese until melted and smooth.
Add the cooked tteok to the cheese sauce and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the tteok is coated in the sauce.
